headline: The Rare Earth Trap: How China Outmaneuvered the Entire Western Defense Industry
summary: China didn’t stumble into rare earth dominance. It spent 30 years building a processing monopoly and systematically crushing every Western attempt to compete

headline: FTSE 100 Live: London stocks open higher as oil eases on plans for more US-Iran talks
summary: FTSE 100 up 16 points to 10,599 Oil prices soften on hopes for more US-Iran talks Updates from Imperial Brands, BP, Intertek, PageGroup 10.12am: Small cap movers Among the small cap movers, TheraCryf PLC has jumped 23% after the addiction-focused biotech said it had rejected a bid...

headline: Why Is Axon (AXON) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of self defense company AXON (NASDAQ:AXON) jumped 5.2% in the afternoon session after equities research analysts at Citizens Jmp reiterated their "market outperform" rating and an $825.00 price target on the stock.
